subject: [PATCH v6 20/20] nfsd: add support to CB_NOTIFY for dir attribute changes

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds support to CB_NOTIFY in the NFSv4 server to send notifications of directory attribute changes alongside other events such as add, remove, and rename operations. The server will still recall the delegation on a SETATTR operation, but these notifications are only sent for changes to child directories. The patch also addresses an issue where signed filehandles were not being appended correctly in certain export configurations.
